title: paepalanthus ciliolatus
intro: Paepalanthus ciliolatus, also known as Brazilian fireworks, is a species of plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Paepalanthus ciliolatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine in Brazil and other parts of South America.
